zh.lifeSummary: 當John Carter於1529年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾沃特福德時，他的父親Richard Croxton Carter39歲，母親Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchier31歲。他於1548年11月3日與Agnes Edlyn在英國賀特福爾沃特福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1559年在英國英格蘭哈普爾洛姆享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾洛姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Carter于1529年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾沃特福德时，他的父亲Richard Croxton Carter39岁，母亲Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchier31岁。他于1548年11月3日与Agnes Edlyn在英国賀特福爾沃特福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1559年在英国英格兰哈普爾洛姆享年30岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾洛姆。

nameMeanings.name: Carter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a transporter of goods, from Middle English carter(e) ‘carter’ (Anglo-Norman French car(e)tier, Old French charetier, medieval Latin carettarius, carettator). The Old French word coalesced with the earlier Middle English word cart(e) ‘cart’, which is from either Old Norse kartr or Old English cræt, both of which, like the Late Latin word, were probably derived from Celtic. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Charman
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for a carter, carrier, or coachman, from Middle English (Old French) char, car ‘car, cart, carriage’ + Middle English man ‘man’. Compare Carter and Carman 2.

English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for someone who did odd jobs, from Middle English char(re), chere (Old English cier(r), cer(r), cear(r), cær(r)) ‘turn (of activity), small job, chore’ + man. Compare Carman 2.
In some cases probably also an Americanized form of Slovenian Čarman (see Carman 5).

variants.name: Chartier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Adelard, Alcide, Emile, Gilles, Raoul, Rosaire, Alphonse.
French: shortened form of charretier, an occupational name for a carter, from an agent derivative of Old French charette ‘cart’.
French Canadian: altered form of English   Carter  , a cognate of 1 above. Compare   Sharkey   and   Shorkey  .

variants.name: Karter
meanings: German: occupational name for a carder (someone who prepares wool for spinning), from Middle High German karter. Compare Carter .

variants.name: McCarter
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McArthur  .

variants.name: Carrier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Cecile, Alain, Gaetan, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Normand.

English and southern French: from Middle English, Old French car(r)ier (from Late Latin carrarius, a derivative of carrum ‘cart, wagon’, a word of Gaulish origin), an occupational name for a carter (see Carter ), in French also for a cartwright. Compare French Charrier .
French: occupational name for a stonemason or quarryman, carrier. Compare Coyer .

variants.name: Cartman
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): occupational name from Middle English cartman ‘man who operated a cart for the transport of goods’. Compare Carter .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Carter was born in 1529, in Watford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Croxton Carter, was 39 and his mother, Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchier, was 31. He married Agnes Edlyn on 3 November 1548, in Watford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1559, in Romsey, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30, and was buried in Romsey, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Carter est né en 1529, à Watford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Croxton Carter, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchier, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Edlyn le 3 novembre 1548, à Watford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1559, à Romsey, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Romsey, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Carter 1529 in Watford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Croxton Carter 39 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchier 31. Er hat am 3. November 1548 in Watford, Hertfordshire, England Agnes Edlyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1559 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Romsey, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Romsey, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Carter è nato il nel 1529 nel Watford, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Croxton Carter, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchier, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Edlyn il 3 novembre 1548, nel Watford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1559, nel Romsey, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Romsey, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Carterが1529年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワトフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Croxton Carterは39歳，母Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchierは31歳であった。1548年11月3日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワトフォードでAgnes Edlynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1559年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアロムセイで30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアロムセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Carter(이)가 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Croxton Carter(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchier(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1548년 11월 3일 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드에서 Agnes Edlyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1559년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 롬시에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 롬시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Carter nasceu em 1529, em Watford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Croxton Carter, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchier, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Edlyn em 3 de novembro de 1548, em Watford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1559, em Romsey, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Romsey, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Carter родился в 1529 г. в местности ватфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Croxton Carter было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchier, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Edlyn 3 ноября 1548 г. в местности ватфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1559 г. в местности ромси, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности ромси, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Carter nació en 1529, en Watford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Croxton Carter, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Elizabeth Bourchier, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Agnes Edlyn el 3 de noviembre de 1548, en Watford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1559, en Romsey, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Romsey, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
